name: Green Rice Casserole
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Monterey Jack or Swiss cheese, shredded
1 10 oz pkg frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 5/8 cup cheese and next four ingredients in a large bowl; stir in rice, spinach, and green onions.
2. Spoon mixture into a lightly greased 1-quart casserole dish.
3. Bake, uncovered, at 375°F for 20 minutes.
4. Sprinkle casserole with remaining 1/8 cup cheese and bake additional 5 minutes.
